name: testColumnHeadersDisplayCorrectlyOnAllPages
description: Verifies that table column headers are displayed correctly on each page when navigating through paginated results.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that table column headers are displayed correctly on each page when navigating through paginated results.
statusMessage: Headers right edge must be within viewport on page '1' with '10'/page expected [true] but found [false]

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0815.005116.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
